components.ImportType: import type should be removed without side-effect

home.title: Python in Tauri
home.description: Enter a number, the app will pass it to Python and show the result multiplied by 4.

errors.pythonFailed: Failed to execute the Python script.

home.inter: this will be styled with a font-face

about.title: About
about.description1: This is a desktop app template built with Tauri, Vue 3, and vue-router.
about.description2: The home page shows a working example of a Tauri command where Rust launches a Python script and returns the result back to the UI.
about.description3: The about page is a separate route so the app is already prepared for splitting screens into dedicated pages as it grows.
